description: Organize the 'dwanko_run' scene from '/home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz' by collapsing the background layers (Column 1 and 2) into a single Sub-Xsheet so that the main timeline only shows the character animation and the collapsed background group. Save the organized scene as '/home/ga/OpenToonz/projects/organized_scene.tnz' and render the first frame to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/organized_verify.png'.
